State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

Technical Assistance • • Administration • • Executive/Legal • • Enforcement • • Statements of Economic Interest
(916) 322-5662          322-5660            322-5901           322-6441              322-6444

March 8, 1984


Margaret O'Donnell
Breon, Gagani, Godino & O'Donnell
Attorneys for Palo Alto Unified
School District
333 Market Street, Suite 950
San Francisco, CA  94105

Re:  Your Request for Advice
     Our No. A-84-044

Dear Ms. O'Donnell:

     We are in receipt of your letter requesting confirmation of
our previous advice to Dr. Robert Calfee, No. A-83-227, dated
October 11, 1983.  I enclose a copy of that letter and confirm
that this is our advice to Dr. Calfee.

                                   Sincerely,

                                   Robert E. Leidigh
                                   Counsel
                                   Legal Division

REL:plh
Enclosure
cc:  Robert Calfee

BREON, GALGANI, GODINO & O'DONNELL
ATTORNEYS AT LAW

KEITH V. BREON*
ROBERT E. GALGANI
RICHARD V. GODINO
ROBERT F. O'DONNELL*

DANA K. SMITH
PRISCILLA BROWN
LOUIS T. LOZANO
SANDRA WOLAVER
MARK W. GOODSON
KENNETH M. FARER
CELIA RUIZ-PALOMINO
RICHARD J. TOMODA
STEVEN KAISER
SHARON M. KEYWORTH

*A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

333 MARKET STREET, SUITE 950
SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105
(415) 546-0400

FEB 29 8 24 AH 84 February 27, 1984

5777 MADISON AVE., SUITE 310
SACRAMENTO, CA 95841
(916) 334-5694

1530 FIFTH AVENUE
SAN RAFAEL, CA 94901
(415) 459-3008

EDUCATION BLDG., COUNTY CIVIC CENTER
VISALIA, CA 93277
(209) 625-2666

925 N STREET, SUITE 130
FRESNO, CA 93721
(209) 446-1352

COSTA MESA, CA
(714) 662-0977

LOS ANGELES, CA
(213) 642-1123

REPLY TO: San Francisco

Robert E. Leidigh
Counsel, Legal Division
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Re: Request From Palo Alto Board of Education
    For Confirmation of Conflict of Interest Opinion

Dear Mr. Leidigh:

    I am writing to you on behalf of the Board of Education
of the Palo Alto Unified School District. On October 11, 1983,
you wrote to Dr. Robert Calfee in answer to his request for
advice. In that letter you informed Dr. Calfee that even though
his wife is a kindergarten teacher in the Palo Alto Unified
School District there was no basis for a disqualifying conflict
of interest under the Political Reform Act which would
disqualify him, should he be elected, from serving on the Board
of Education of the Palo Alto Unified School District and
participating and voting on teacher contract negotiations.

    Dr. Calfee was elected to the Board of Education in the
November election. His participation and voting in contract
negotiations with the Palo Alto Education Association is being
questioned as a conflict of interest.

    Therefore, the Board of Education would appreciate it
if you would confirm for its members your opinion regarding
Dr. Calfee's ability to participate and vote on teacher contract
negotiation matters.

Robert E. Leidigh
February 27, 1984
Page Two


     The members of the Board of Education and I appreciate
your assistance in this matter.  Please contact me should you
have any questions.

                                   Very truly yours,

                                   BREON, GALGANI, GODINO & O'DONNELL
                                   [signature]
                                   Margaret E. O'Donnell
                                   Attorneys for Palo Alto Unified
                                   School District

MEO/ctb
